channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car Wheel Fly Tipped on Street, 17th July
item.description:
Car Wheel has been dumped on the street, left against river wall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowcourt Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fountain does not turn off, 17th July
item.description:
This fountain was badly installed. The fountain does not turn off and the dog side just leaks all over the path. Poor installation

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Tree growing YET AGAIN, 17th July
item.description:
This dangerous plant is growing again. I appreciate that this has extra stems growing but how much is this costing to keep pruning and cutting back this plant when it needs digging out or killing off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alford Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes and road breaking up, 17th July
Fly tipping (furniture/ rubbish), 17th July
item.description:
Fly tipping (furniture/ rubbish)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4-12, Elgar Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: My garden bin used for Waste food collection and left full of rotten food inside, 17th July
item.description:
This morning Waste bin collectors have used my house garden bin to empty all waste food collection in Sutton Square leaving the bin in the street full of rubbish. This is unacceptable. Do collect it immediately

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sutton Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shopping trolley, 17th July
item.description:
Dumped shopping trolley Please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lenthall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Forest bikes on pavements, 17th July
item.description:
Not licences in this area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mains water leak, 17th July
item.description:
Mains water leak at site of previous repair. Water bubbling out of a previous repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pope Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recent clear up exercise only addressed paint spill on the Road., 17th July
item.description:
Clear up exercise has only been part carried out - further attention is required.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillside Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street very dirty after bin collection, 17th July
item.description:
Food waste etc left on street after bins have been emptied and put away.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterson Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Like bike on yellow line (and bus route) blocking roadway and driveway, 17th July
item.description:
One Lime bike - left outside the demarcated area and blocking road Note: there is lots of bike spaces, so pure laziness and bad attitude of the hirer of the bike - so should be fined and banned for hiring bikes in the future

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Canfield Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, maggots, and fly infested, 17th July
item.description:
The bins are overflowing and there is more fly tipping done by the side of the bins. My house is adjacent to this. I can’t open my windows because of the stench. It’s also a fire hazard in this hot weather. This needs urgent attention thank you for your corporation. I would appreciate a reply. Many thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Llanover Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping over fence in St Mary's Frobisher Park, 17th July
item.description:
There is a recurring problem of people fly-tipping over the fence in St Mary's Frobisher Park into my garden. The most recent incident occurred this afternoon. I saw a man reaching over my fence, and then adjusting his trousers before walking away. I then discovered a bottle of yellow liquid (see attached photo), so I guess he urinated into the bottle and then put it over the fence. On another occasion a few months ago, I discovered the remnants of a fast food meal had been thrown over inside its bag, and on another occasion last year I discovered some clothes had been thrown over (see attached photos).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belfort Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest bikes, 17th July
item.description:
Forest bikes left on pavement outside 69 and 67 Southend Road. Bromley is a restricted zone for this company. Please can these be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Hill Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alley needs sweeping, 17th July
item.description:
Alleyway between Albury street and Deptford church street has not been swept for many months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mary Ann Gardens, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped 270 - 290 downham way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downham Way, Downham, Greater London

item.title: Colberg place has not been swept for 2 weeks, 17th July
item.description:
Colberg Place has not been swept for 2 weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colberg Place, Hackney, London

item.title: Suspected leaking watermain and pothole, 17th July
item.description:
Outside schools house in beaverbrook road, there is a pothole with water.I suspected that this is being caused by a leaking watermain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaverwood Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish bags and drawer, 17th July
item.description:
Bags left after the black bin collection. Drawer there for a few days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greening Street, Abbey Wood
